mnemonics.title: NLP PREP Steps
mnemonics.content: Never Let Punctuation Trouble You: Normalize, Lowercase, Preprocess, Remove stopwords, Eliminate noise, Process tokens

acronyms.usage: Subword tokenization method merging frequent character pairs

visualTips.visualization: Imagine breaking a sentence into Lego blocks where each block represents a linguistic unit

analogies.analogy: Like roughly chopping vegetables (stemming) vs precision knife work (lemmatization)
